content.visible_text: Home Academy Classes Programs Schedule Contact Us News & Events Interested in having a Lion Dance, Dragon or Martial Arts Demonstration at your next event? To book a performance for your special event email details of your event to: Lion Dance for Our Event Your email should include: • Contact information (Include email and telephone number) • Description of event (examples-wedding, company party, anniversary, birthday, etc.) • Date and Time • Location • Number of persons attending We will design a proposal to meet your needs and provide you with an enjoyable performance. Click Here A Short History of Lion Dance Information about the origins of lion dancing Click Here Lion Dance Performances Recent performances About Us "Train Harder, Live Better!"® We teach Choy Li Fut Kung Fu and Yang Tai Chi Chuan.
